• Implemented.

  Code fixes

  1. Phase-move refresh bug fixed in packages/frontend/src/components/PhaseCreationModal.vue.

  - After editing a phase parent, the UI now rebuilds the visible phase-column chain from root selection
    (uiStore.selectPhase(0, ...)) and restores focus.
  - Result: moved phase appears immediately in the destination sibling’s next column without requiring “navigate away and back”.

  2. WebGL relation drag fixed in packages/frontend/src/views/GraphView.vue.

  - Mouse-up now resolves the actual drop node under cursor (instead of always using drag-start node).
  - Canvas handlers switched to capture phase (@mousedown.capture, @mouseup.capture) so drop-target resolution happens before
    finalize logic.
  - Behavior now matches your rules:
      - drop on free space: create new supporting aim flow
      - drop on another aim: connect
      - drop on same aim: no-op

  Verification

  - npm run type-check -w frontend passed
  - npm run test:unit -w frontend passed (16 files, 68 tests)
